title: Karutha Suryan
overview: Karutha Sooryan is a Malayalam movie starring Manjusha and Muhammad Shah in prominent roles. The movie also stars Megha, Navnindra Behl, Neena Kurup and Suresh Gopi. It is a drama directed by EVM Ali.
